basic_details.job_title: SBSC Delhi University Staff Nurse Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: Shaheed Bhagat Singh College (SBSC Delhi University)
basic_details.short_information: Shaheed Bhagat Singh College (SBSC Delhi University) has released the official Staff Nurse Notification 2026 at sbsc.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the SBSC Delhi University Staff Nurse Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates up to 35 years of age with a B.Sc. (Hons.) in Nursing or a Diploma in General Nursing and Midwifery with relevant experience can apply offline on or before 20 July 2026. The official notification PDF and offline application form are available below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years. Age relaxation will be allowed as per University of Delhi norms.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Nursing or Diploma in General Nursing and midwifery with experience.
qualification.details: Staff Nurse: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Nursing from a recognized University or Institute/Regular Course in B.Sc. Nursing from a recognized University or Institute/or Institute/Post Basic B.Sc. (Nursing) from recognized University or Institute; Registered as Nurse or Nurse and Midwife (RN or RN and RM) with State Nursing Council, Six months experience in minimum 20 bedded hospital after acquiring the educational qualification mentioned above. OR Diploma in General Nursing and midwifery from a recognized Board or Council; Registered as Nurse or Nurse and midwifery (RN or RN and RM) with State Nursing Council; Two and half year experience in minimum 50 bedded hospital after acquiring the above education qualification.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://www.sbs.du.ac.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 20-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download SBSC Delhi University Staff Nurse Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download SBSC Delhi University Staff Nurse Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.shaheed_bhagat_singh_college_sbsc_delhi_: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Nursing or Diploma in General Nursing and midwifery with experience.

content_sections.heading: SBSC Delhi University Staff Nurse Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the SBSC Delhi University Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download SBSC Delhi University Staff Nurse Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Staff Nurse: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Nursing from a recognized University or Institute/Regular Course in B.Sc. Nursing from a recognized University or Institute/or Institute/Post Basic B.Sc. (Nursing) from recognized University or Institute; Registered as Nurse or Nurse and Midwife (RN or RN and RM) with State Nursing Council, Six months experience in minimum 20 bedded hospital after acquiring the educational qualification mentioned above. OR Diploma in General Nursing and midwifery from a recognized Board or Council; Registered as Nurse or Nurse and midwifery (RN or RN and RM) with State Nursing Council; Two and half year experience in minimum 50 bedded hospital after acquiring the above education qualification.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years. Age relaxation will be allowed as per University of Delhi norms.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://www.sbs.du.ac.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 20-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: SBSC Delhi University Staff Nurse Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Staff Nurse post at Shaheed Bhagat Singh College?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the Staff Nurse position at Shaheed Bhagat Singh College is 20-07-2026. Candidates are advised to ensure their applications reach the college before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Staff Nurse position?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification includes a B.Sc. (Hons.) in Nursing or a Diploma in General Nursing and Midwifery, along with relevant experience as specified in the notification. Registered Nurse status is also mandatory.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Staff Nurse recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Staff Nurse post is 35 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per the norms set by the University of Delhi.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Staff Nurse position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Staff Nurse position will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 40,000/-.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the Staff Nurse vacancy?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. Candidates need to download the application form from the official website, fill it out, attach necessary documents, and send it to the address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies for the Staff Nurse post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Staff Nurse post announced by Shaheed Bhagat Singh College.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Staff Nurse role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Staff Nurse position will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a contractual job?
faq.answer: Yes, the Staff Nurse position at Shaheed Bhagat Singh College is a contractual job.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of Shaheed Bhagat Singh College, which is https://www.sbs.du.ac.in.
